title: Crafting Revamped
description: Adds 35 new crafting recipes for unobtainable items and blocks.
body:
**Crafting Revamped Mod**
Version: 1.0.0
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Creator: Diffenyy

**Overview:**
Ever felt _frustrated_ by those elusive items and blocks in Minecraft that you just can't craft? With the Crafting Revamped Mod, your worries are a thing of the past! This mod introduces 35 brand-new crafting recipes, allowing you to obtain previously unobtainable items and blocks seamlessly through crafting.

**Features**
35 New Crafting Recipes: Unlock the ability to craft items and blocks that were once only accessible through creative mode or rare loot.
Balanced Crafting Costs: Each recipe is carefully designed to maintain game balance, ensuring a fair and enjoyable experience.
Diverse Item Types: From decorative blocks and rare materials to unique items and functional blocks, this mod enhances your crafting possibilities.
Integration with Existing Gameplay: All new recipes blend seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft, respecting the original aesthetics and mechanics of the game.

**Crafting Recipes Include:**
_Bedrock:_ For those epic builds where you need an indestructible foundation.
_Elytra:_ Soar through the skies without the need to search for End Cities.
_Barrier Blocks:_ Perfect for trolling your friends.
_Trident:_ Equip yourself with this powerful weapon without venturing into the ocean depths.
_Enchanted Golden Apples:_ Bring back the ability to craft this powerful item.
_Totem of Undying:_ Ensure your survival with this life-saving artifact.
And many more...

**Installation**
_Download the Mod_: Obtain the latest version of the Crafting Revamped Mod.
_Install Forge:_ Ensure you have Minecraft Forge installed for compatibility.
_Add to Mods Folder:_ Move the downloaded .jar file to your Minecraft mods folder.
_Launch Minecraft:_ Start Minecraft with the Forge profile and enjoy crafting the unobtainable!
Feedback and Support

I'd love to hear your feedback! If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for future updates, please reach out to us.

Unleash your creativity and redefine your Minecraft experience with the Crafting Revamped Mod.
